title.en: Prismatic Refraction: The Architecture of Light

description.ko: PRISM-2 미학에서 영감을 받은 이 테마는 백색광이 기하학적 유리를 통해 고유한 색상으로 분해되는 순간을 포착하여 명확성과 다면적인 시각을 상징합니다.
description.en: Inspired by the PRISM-2 aesthetic, this theme captures the moment white light breaks into its constituent colors through geometric glass, symbolizing clarity and multifaceted perspectives.

prompt: A high-end macro photography shot of a triangular glass prism refracting a single beam of light into a brilliant, multi-layered rainbow spectrum. The background is a clean, neutral gray with subtle caustic light patterns. Sharp focus on the glass edges, realistic chromatic aberration, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-detailed textures.
